status: Complete - All executed experiments on small data (CPU), full-scale GPU execution pending

classical_baselines.note: Tree ensembles ~0.12 R2 above linear models

ablation_study_small_data.config: config_small_log1p.yaml (5 epochs, log1p target transform, 3905 train / 783 val samples)
key_findings: M3 (Retraction) most critical: +21.1% loss when removed
M2 (Recovery) second most critical: +16.3% loss when removed
M4 (Query Head) important: +12.3% loss when removed
M1 (Encoder) removal IMPROVES on small data: -6.8% (encoder overfits small dataset)
M5 (Gate) removal slightly improves: +0.4% (hard refusal too aggressive on small data)
Minimal model competitive: -8.5% vs full (19K vs 383K params, 20x smaller)

limitations: Small data subset only (3905 train, 783 val vs 2.8M full)
No modern DL baselines (FT-Transformer, TabPFN, etc.) run

gpu_requirements.ablations: 125 GPU-hours (7 configs x 5 seeds x 100 epochs)

publication_readiness.category: D - Requires GPU Cluster Before Submission
publication_readiness.editor_summary: Methodologically exemplary experimental design (registered, frozen, clear hypotheses). Computational execution incomplete - main benchmark not completed due to hardware constraints.
next_steps: Run full BENCH-001 campaign on HWIN-Bench
Execute ablations, theory validation, robustness, calibration
Re-evaluate for Category A (Nature MI) or B (ICML/NeurIPS/ICLR)
